name: @composa/annotation-kit
description: Code-native, AI-readable component annotations for Storybook — accessibility (codified GitHub/CVS toolkit) + variant + measurement.
_attribution: Accessibility type taxonomy + tier model adapted from github/annotation-toolkit (forked from CVS Health's Web Accessibility Annotation Kit), CC-BY 4.0. Variant + measurement systems are original Composa work.
_note: Staging package — not yet published. Splits into @composa/annotation-core + @composa/a11y-annotations + @composa/ds-annotations on extraction (see README).
